mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STG_REGION_TOUR_PORTAL ( SOURCE_ID, REGION_CODE, SIGUNGU_CODE, TOURISM_PORTAL_URL, RAW_CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{sourceId}, #{regionCode}, #{sigunguCode}, #{tourismPortalUrl}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO REGION_MASTER R USING ( SELECT TRIM(REGION_CODE) AS REGION_CODE, TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) AS SIGUNGU_CODE, MAX(TOURISM_PORTAL_URL) AS TOURISM_PORTAL_URL FROM STG_REGION_TOUR_PORTAL WHERE TOURISM_PORTAL_URL IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TRIM(REGION_CODE), TRIM(SIGUNGU_CODE) ) S ON ( TRIM(CAST(R.REGION_CODE AS VARCHAR2(20))) = S.REGION_CODE AND TRIM(CAST(R.SIGUNGU_CODE AS VARCHAR2(20))) = S.SIGUNGU_CODE ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET R.TOURISM_PORTAL_URL = S.TOURISM_PORTAL_URL, R.TOURISM_PORTAL_SYNCED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP
